title: koeleria vallesiana var. alpicola
intro: Koeleria vallesiana var. alpicola, also known as alpine June grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving antioxidant defenses, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Koeleria vallesiana var. alpicola can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and uses.
